agent_rows.rationale: The candidate computes providentFund as an integer cast of 22% of BasicSalary, matching the expected behavior.
The migrated candidate computes dearness allowance as an integer of 10% of the basic salary using (int)(employee.BasicSalary * 0.10m).
The candidate computes housing allowance as (int)(employee.BasicSalary * 0.40m), which matches 40% of the basic salary cast to int.
Candidate computes totalDeductions as the sum of providentFund and otherDeductions, matching the expected behavior.
Net pay is computed as totalEarnings minus totalDeductions in the candidate code.
The migrated candidate defines a function that takes a parameter named employee of type Employee (CalculateSalary(Employee employee)), matching the expected input parameter behavior.
